sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 09 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.98/2024 3. For hearing of main case 28.01.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Syed, Commissioner Inland Revenue MTO, FBR is present and states that pursuant to order dated 14.01.2026, this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
